# Tape Reader — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Tape Reader is a pre-launch trading intelligence platform that quantifies the actionability of financial news through a proprietary Signal Score (0–100), breaking each headline into four sub-metrics: Velocity, Magnitude, Decay, and Confidence. The brand identity is unapologetically technical and trader-native — think Bloomberg Terminal density fused with Linear.app's clean precision — targeting sophisticated market participants who speak in catalysts, flow, IV, and edge. The aesthetic is dark, confident, and data-driven with zero finance clichés; the animated Live Tape hero mock and Signal Score card are the centrepiece visuals, reinforcing the platform's core promise: cutting noise, surfacing signal.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://tape-reader.zappy5.app
Tape Reader scores every financial headline 0–100 so you trade catalysts, not chaos. The smarter alternative to Edgewonk trading journal workflows. Join the waitlist.

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Tape Reader
Tape Reader is a pre-launch trading intelligence platform that quantifies the actionability of financial news through a proprietary Signal Score (0–100), breaking each headline into four sub-metrics: Velocity, Magnitude, Decay, and Confidence. The brand identity is unapologetically technical and trader-native — think Bloomberg Terminal density fused with Linear.app's clean precision — targeting sophisticated market participants who speak in catalysts, flow, IV, and edge. The aesthetic is dark, confident, and data-driven with zero finance clichés; the animated Live Tape hero mock and Signal Score card are the centrepiece visuals, reinforcing the platform's core promise: cutting noise, surfacing signal.

## Target Audience
sophisticated traders and market participants who are already experienced

## Industry
financial technology / trading

---
